rules.reason: User confirmed: always auto-archive Notifications. Trash after 6 weeks.
User confirmed: always auto-archive Newsletters. Trash after 3 months.
LinkedIn/Microsoft job alerts are notifications, not applications. Auto-archive + mark read. Trash after 6 weeks.
Enwild outdoor gear marketing emails — Newsletters, auto-archive + mark read. Trash after 3 months.
User confirmed: always trash CryptoJobsList newsletters
Phishing — unsolicited loan scam with urgency cues. Never interact with links. Always route to SPAM.
LinkedIn aggregated hiring/network digests — Notifications only (no Job Search/Recruiter overlay). Archive + mark read. Trash after 6 weeks.
LinkedIn InMail 'Message replied' notifications indicate a closed exchange. Archive as Job Search/Closed + @Reference. Trash after 3 months.
Appointment reminders — keep visible in inbox and unread until the appointment passes. After the appointment date, classifier can archive + mark read.
